name: Cosmic Strike
gear_bonus: Whenever you deal direct damage, applies Cosmic Strike, increasing your Offense by 20 for 10 sec. This effect can occur once every 2 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. + At 10 stacks, increases your chance to critically hit by 100% and sets your critical severity to 150% for 5 sec or until you directly damage a target. Once this effect is used, expires all stacks of Cosmic Strike.;Super_Stats=20
bonus_text: Whenever you deal direct damage, applies Cosmic Strike, increasing your Offense by 20 for 10 sec. This effect can occur once every 2 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. + At 10 stacks, increases your chance to critically hit by 100% and sets your critical severity to 150% for 5 sec or until you directly damage a target. Once this effect is used, expires all stacks of Cosmic Strike.

name: Cosmic Ambition
gear_bonus: If you hold block for at least 2 sec, after releasing, increases your resistance to damage by 50% and increases your resistance to Knock effects by 100% for 10 sec. + While this effect is active, all effects and damage against you will act as if you are blocking. This does not provide any of the effect bonuses your block may grant you, but will change how damage and effects are applied to you from certain powers. + All effects expire when you take direct damage and cannot be triggered again for 10 sec. + When this effect expires, applies Cosmic Threat to you, increasing your resistance to Hold effects by 100%, and further increasing your Threat Generation by 10% for 10 sec.;Super_Stats=20
bonus_text: If you hold block for at least 2 sec, after releasing, increases your resistance to damage by 50% and increases your resistance to Knock effects by 100% for 10 sec. + While this effect is active, all effects and damage against you will act as if you are blocking. This does not provide any of the effect bonuses your block may grant you, but will change how damage and effects are applied to you from certain powers. + All effects expire when you take direct damage and cannot be triggered again for 10 sec. + When this effect expires, applies Cosmic Threat to you, increasing your resistance to Hold effects by 100%, and further increasing your Threat Generation by 10% for 10 sec.

name: Cosmic Presence
gear_bonus: If an ally is below 50% health, your direct heals heal for an additional 10% on that target. If an ally is below 10% health, your direct heals heal power is a Maintain, for an additional 100%. + If the instead causes one application of the power to heal for an additional 950%. No additional bonus healing from this effect can occur again for 10 sec.;Super_Stats=20
bonus_text: If an ally is below 50% health, your direct heals heal for an additional 10% on that target. If an ally is below 10% health, your direct heals heal power is a Maintain, for an additional 100%. + If the instead causes one application of the power to heal for an additional 950%. No additional bonus healing from this effect can occur again for 10 sec.

name: Cosmic Wonder
gear_bonus: Reduces the cooldown on your Crowd Control and Summon powers by 1 sec every time you directly damage or heal a target. This effect can occur once every 2 sec. Does not affect Ultimate powers.;Super_Stats=20
bonus_text: Reduces the cooldown on your Crowd Control and Summon powers by 1 sec every time you directly damage or heal a target. This effect can occur once every 2 sec. Does not affect Ultimate powers.
